summary: Iteration 32: Comprehensive audit logging testing. All 39 backend tests pass (100%). All 7 new /logs endpoints working, all 7 frontend tabs have working Logs buttons with dialogs. Audit log writes confirmed for register, login, verify-email, profile update, payment-methods, settings. Checkout success portal link verified as working correctly.

issues: Console hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>' - caused by Emergent framework VE wrapper, not application code. Non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found. All audit logging implementations are complete and working correctly.
The /admin/users/{id}/logs endpoint correctly uses require_super_admin; the admin@automateaccounts.local user is a super_admin so access is granted.
Product logs show empty state 'No logs found' for products that haven't had CRUD operations performed - this is correct behavior.
seed_data_creation: Created test promo codes, override codes, quote requests, and bank transactions during testing (auto-cleaned up in test teardown).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 tested the comprehensive audit logging feature. Key findings: (1) All 7 new /logs GET endpoints (customers, users, products, promo-codes, override-codes, quote-requests, terms) return 200 with {logs: [...]} array. (2) Bank transactions /logs returns merged inline+audit_logs. (3) Audit log writes confirmed for 6 key operations: register, login, verify-email, profile update, payment-methods, settings. (4) All 7 admin frontend tabs (Users, Customers, Products, PromoCodes, OverrideCodes, QuoteRequests, Terms) have working Logs buttons that open dialogs. (5) Checkout success page 'Go to customer portal' link points to /portal and portal page loads correctly with customer orders/subscriptions. Admin credentials: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123! (super_admin). Customer credentials: test_user_004712@test.com / Test1234!.
